channel.title: European Strategic Autonomy on Asymmetric Intelligence
channel.description: Weekly briefing on hybrid threats, European defence, and the geopolitical contest over European strategic independence. Published every Wednesday.

item.title: European Strategic Autonomy Monitor — W/E 29 April 2026
item.description: EU sanctions Russian FIMI entities Euromore and Pravfond for influence operations

item.title: European Strategic Autonomy Monitor — W/E 16 April 2026
item.description: EU Council adopts offensive hybrid deterrence conclusions as EDIP programme opens first industry calls.

item.title: European Strategic Autonomy Monitor — W/E 12 April 2026
item.description: EU Council adopts conclusions to counter Russia-linked hybrid threats including sabotage and FIMI.

item.title: European Strategic Autonomy Monitor — W/E 8 April 2026
item.description: EU Council adopts hybrid deterrence conclusions as Russia's grey-zone tempo accelerates. 40 arson plots Germany/Poland (quadrupled 2023-2024), airspace incursions, ECFR offensive doctrine shift. Hungary election 4 days out.

item.title: European Strategic Autonomy Monitor — W/E 1 April 2026
item.description: Russian spring offensive stalling as internal critics admit Ukrainian counterattacks 'rather successful'; Kremlin halts gasoline exports; Zelensky proposes Easter ceasefire — dismissed by Moscow. Hungary election enters final 12 days. SAFE second wave €17.1B for France and Czechia.

item.title: European Geopolitical & Hybrid Threat Monitor -- W/E 29 March 2026
item.description: Hungary election crisis deepens with BBC voter intimidation expose and confirmed Russian political technologists in Budapest; NATO reports 20% European defence spending increase; Slovenia election produces razor-thin result amid Israeli Black Cube interference.
